backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for a digital library app, including data types and logic for books, users, reading progress, bookmarks, notifications, and admin stats, with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the 'redeploy without code changes' feature to its associated files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component or page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties (color tokens) for the design system including background, foreground, primary, accent, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Prodigy app that sets the page title, favicon links, and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application entry point that configures TanStack Router with all page routes (Home, Browse, BookDetail, Reader, Upload, Dashboard, Admin, AuthorProfile, About) wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Admin panel sidebar with navigation items (Overview, Users, Books, Security) and active-section highlighting, plus a system status indicator.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookManage: Admin section for listing, filtering, approving/rejecting, and editing books, with paginated results and a dialog for editing book metadata.
frontend/src/components/admin/OverviewSe: Admin overview dashboard showing platform stats cards and lists of most-viewed and most-popular books fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/SecuritySe: Admin security panel that allows restricting a user's access by downgrading their role to guest via principal ID input, and displays pending books.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Admin UI component for viewing and managing platform users with search, pagination, and ban (role restriction) functionality. Currently returns an empty user list due to a missing backend `getAllUsers` endpoint.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that restricts access to admin-only content by checking authentication state and admin privileges, showing appropriate login or access-denied UI otherwise.
frontend/src/components/AnalyticsOvervie: Analytics dashboard component for authors displaying stat cards (total books, views, approved, pending) and Recharts-based pie and bar charts for genre distribution and monthly upload/view growth.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that shows a login prompt with a 'Browse as Guest' link when the user is not authenticated, and renders children when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/BookCard.tsx: Displays a single book as a card with cover image (loaded from bytes), title, author, genres, and optional status badge, linking to the book detail page.
frontend/src/components/CelestialDivider: Renders a decorative horizontal divider with gradient lines and centered star symbols.
frontend/src/components/DashboardBookCar: A dashboard-specific book card with cover image, status badge, drag handle, checkbox selection, and edit/delete/share action buttons for author book management.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedBooks.ts: Fetches and displays up to 6 recently approved books in a responsive grid using BookCard, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, navigation links, genre quick-links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/GenreCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a single genre with an icon, description, and background texture, linking to the browse page filtered by that genre.
Displays a horizontal list of pill-shaped genre links with icons for quick navigation to filtered browse results.
frontend/src/components/HelpTooltip.tsx: A small help icon button that shows a tooltip with provided content text on hover.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-height hero section with an animated canvas starfield background, app tagline, and CTA buttons linking to browse and dashboard.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component wrapping all pages with ThemeProvider, Navbar, Footer, a one-time loading screen, profile setup modal, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen splash/loading overlay displaying the Prodigy logo with a pulsing animation shown on first app load.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout using the useInternetIdentity hook, clearing the React Query cache on logout and showing loading/authenticated states.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: A sticky navigation bar with logo, nav links, theme toggle, and auth button; supports mobile menu, authenticated-only links (Dashboard, Upload), and Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: A bell icon button that generates in-app notifications from book view milestones and approval events, tracks read state locally, and opens a NotificationPanel sheet.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: A slide-in Sheet panel that displays a scrollable list of app notifications with type icons, timestamps, unread highlighting, and a mark-all-read action.
frontend/src/components/PDFUploadZone.ts: A drag-and-drop file upload zone for PDFs that shows a file preview with name/size and a clear button once a file is selected.
frontend/src/components/PDFViewer.tsx: A PDF viewer component that dynamically loads PDF.js from CDN, renders pages to a canvas element, and provides pagination, zoom, and page-jump controls.
frontend/src/components/PendingBooksQueu: An admin queue component that lists pending books with cover thumbnails, metadata, and approve/reject action buttons backed by mutation hooks and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown to authenticated users who have no profile, allowing them to enter a display name and save it via the backend mutation.
frontend/src/components/SharePopover.tsx: Popover component that provides share options for a book, including copying its URL to clipboard and sharing it on Twitter/X.
frontend/src/components/StatsCards.tsx: Displays a 4-card grid of admin statistics (total users, books, approved, pending) fetched from the backend, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook, showing a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports constants for the Prodigy brand asset paths, including the full logo and favicon icon.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, books (CRUD, filtering, bookmarks), and file uploads.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages dark/light theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the `dark` class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark and admin themes, custom scrollbar styles, and line-clamp utilities.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merger (`cn`), date/string formatting helpers, and genre constants with associated icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page for Prodigy, displaying a hero section, mission statement with stats, and a grid of core values (Open Access, Community First, Global Reach, Author Empowerment).
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page protected by AdminGuard, featuring a responsive sidebar (desktop and mobile sheet) that switches between Overview, User Management, Book Management, and Security sections.
frontend/src/pages/AuthorProfile.tsx: Displays a public author profile page showing the author's name and a grid of their published books, fetched by author name from the URL parameter.
frontend/src/pages/BookDetail.tsx: Shows detailed information for a single book including cover image, metadata, bookmark toggle, and view tracking, with loading skeletons and a not-found fallback.
frontend/src/pages/Browse.tsx: Library catalog page that displays all approved books with search-by-title/author filtering and genre filter buttons, using URL search params to persist the selected genre.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Authenticated user dashboard with tabs for uploaded books, bookmarks, reading progress, and analytics, plus an inline upload/edit form for managing book submissions.
frontend/src/pages/Genres.tsx: Renders a genre browsing page displaying all genres as a grid of GenreCard components with a decorative header and a footer link to the full library.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component displaying a hero section, live stats (total books, readers, authors), genre browsing links, featured books, and a call-to-action for authors.
frontend/src/pages/Reader.tsx: In-browser PDF reader page that fetches a book by ID, renders it in an iframe via a blob URL, and periodically saves reading progress for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/Upload.tsx: Book upload page with a form for title, author, description, genre selection (up to 3), cover image, and PDF file (max 20MB), guarded by authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Cinzel, Inter), CSS-variable-based color tokens, border radii, animations, and plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing features, and configuration for a redeployment task with no new feature requests.
